Document merge/insert rules: Import the correct namespace for form fields: Aspose.Words.Fields.
Loading rules: Use the correct constructor for Document (string fileName) and DocumentBuilder (Document).
Create or load a Document before applying protection.
Keep the Document(string) constructor for loading the DOCX as the prescribed load rule.
Saving/Export rules: Specify the save format explicitly (SaveFormat.Docm) when saving a macro‑enabled document.
Ensure HtmlFixedSaveOptions.ExportFormFields is set to true to export interactive form fields.
Use HtmlFixedSaveOptions with ExportFormFields = true to export form fields as interactive HTML input elements.
Save the document with the configured HtmlFixedSaveOptions.
Keep the protection type as AllowOnlyFormFields and save using SaveFormat.Dot.
